mapper.select: SELECT j.job_id, j.title, j.job_type, j.job_duty, j.job_requirements, j.experience_requirement, j.education_requirement, j.job_skills, j.min_salary, j.max_salary, j.location, j.is_active, j.verify_status, j.verify_remark, j.post_date, j.expiration_date, j.created_at, j.updated_at, c.company_id, c.company_name, c.industry, c.scale, c.address, c.website, c.description as company_description, c.logo_url FROM jobs j INNER JOIN companies c ON j.company_id = c.company_id WHERE j.is_active = 1 AND (j.expiration_date IS NULL OR j.expiration_date >= CURDATE()) ORDER BY j.post_date DESC

SELECT j.job_id, j.title, j.job_type, j.job_duty, j.job_requirements, j.experience_requirement, j.education_requirement, j.job_skills, j.min_salary, j.max_salary, j.location, j.is_active, j.verify_status, j.verify_remark, j.post_date, j.expiration_date, j.created_at, j.updated_at, c.company_id, c.company_name, c.industry, c.scale, c.address, c.website, c.description as company_description, c.logo_url FROM jobs j INNER JOIN companies c ON j.company_id = c.company_id WHERE j.is_active = 1 AND (j.expiration_date IS NULL OR j.expiration_date >= CURDATE())
AND ( j.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR j.job_duty LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR j.job_requirements LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR j.location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.industry LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND j.job_type = #{jobType}
AND j.location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{location}, '%')
AND c.industry LIKE CONCAT('%', #{industry}, '%')
AND j.experience_requirement LIKE CONCAT('%', #{experience}, '%')
AND j.education_requirement LIKE CONCAT('%', #{education}, '%')
AND c.scale LIKE CONCAT('%', #{companyScale}, '%')
AND j.job_id IN
#{jobId}
AND 1 = 0
AND j.job_id NOT IN
#{jobId}
ORDER BY j.max_salary DESC, j.post_date DESC
ORDER BY j.expiration_date DESC, j.post_date DESC
ORDER BY j.post_date DESC

SELECT j.job_id, j.title, j.job_type, j.job_duty, j.job_requirements, j.experience_requirement, j.education_requirement, j.job_skills, j.min_salary, j.max_salary, j.location, j.is_active, j.verify_status, j.verify_remark, j.post_date, j.expiration_date, j.created_at, j.updated_at, c.company_id, c.company_name, c.industry, c.scale, c.address, c.website, c.description as company_description, c.logo_url FROM jobs j INNER JOIN companies c ON j.company_id = c.company_id WHERE j.job_id = #{jobId}

SELECT j.job_id, j.title, j.job_type, j.job_duty, j.job_requirements, j.experience_requirement, j.education_requirement, j.job_skills, j.min_salary, j.max_salary, j.location, j.is_active, j.verify_status, j.verify_remark, j.post_date, j.expiration_date, j.created_at, j.updated_at, c.company_id, c.company_name, c.industry, c.scale, c.address, c.website, c.description as company_description, c.logo_url FROM jobs j INNER JOIN companies c ON j.company_id = c.company_id WHERE j.is_active = 1
AND (j.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR j.job_duty LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR j.job_requirements LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND j.job_type = #{jobType}
AND j.location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{location}, '%')
ORDER BY j.post_date DESC

SELECT j.job_id, j.title, j.job_type, j.job_duty, j.job_requirements, j.experience_requirement, j.education_requirement, j.job_skills, j.min_salary, j.max_salary, j.location, j.is_active, j.verify_status, j.verify_remark, j.post_date, j.expiration_date, j.created_at, j.updated_at, c.company_id, c.company_name, c.industry, c.scale, c.address, c.website, c.description as company_description, c.logo_url FROM jobs j INNER JOIN companies c ON j.company_id = c.company_id WHERE j.is_active = 1
AND (j.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR j.job_duty LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR j.job_requirements LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND j.job_type = #{jobType}
AND j.location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{location}, '%')
AND (j.location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{city}, '%') OR j.city LIKE CONCAT('%', #{city}, '%'))
AND j.max_salary >= #{minSalary}
AND j.min_salary <= #{maxSalary}
AND c.industry LIKE CONCAT('%', #{industry}, '%')
AND ( j.experience_requirement LIKE CONCAT('%', #{experience}, '%') OR j.experience_requirement LIKE '%不限%' OR j.experience_requirement LIKE '%应届%' OR (#{experience} LIKE '%应届%' AND j.experience_requirement LIKE '%应届%') OR (#{experience} LIKE '%应届%' AND j.experience_requirement LIKE '%在校%') OR (#{experience} LIKE '%1年%' AND j.experience_requirement LIKE '%应届%') OR (#{experience} LIKE '%1-3年%' AND (j.experience_requirement LIKE '%1年%' OR j.experience_requirement LIKE '%应届%')) OR (#{experience} LIKE '%3-5年%' AND (j.experience_requirement LIKE '%1-3年%' OR j.experience_requirement LIKE '%1年%')) )
AND ( j.education_requirement LIKE CONCAT('%', #{education}, '%') OR j.education_requirement LIKE '%不限%' OR (#{education} LIKE '%本科%' AND (j.education_requirement LIKE '%大专%' OR j.education_requirement LIKE '%高中%')) OR (#{education} LIKE '%硕士%' AND (j.education_requirement LIKE '%本科%' OR j.education_requirement LIKE '%大专%')) )
AND ( c.scale LIKE CONCAT('%', #{companyScale}, '%') OR (#{companyScale} LIKE '%20-99%' AND c.scale LIKE '%51-100%') OR (#{companyScale} LIKE '%100-499%' AND (c.scale LIKE '%100-500%' OR c.scale LIKE '%51-100%')) OR (#{companyScale} LIKE '%500%' AND c.scale LIKE '%500%') OR (#{companyScale} LIKE '%1000%' AND c.scale LIKE '%1000%') )
ORDER BY j.post_date DESC

SELECT j.job_id, j.title, j.job_type, j.job_duty, j.job_requirements, j.experience_requirement, j.education_requirement, j.job_skills, j.min_salary, j.max_salary, j.location, j.is_active, j.verify_status, j.verify_remark, j.post_date, j.expiration_date, j.created_at, j.updated_at, c.company_id, c.company_name, c.industry, c.scale, c.address, c.website, c.description as company_description, c.logo_url FROM jobs j INNER JOIN companies c ON j.company_id = c.company_id WHERE j.company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY j.created_at DESC
